stemHtml: The weighing of an aircraft must be performed…

options.a: Whenever the cumulative change to the Dry Operating Mass exceeds plus/minus 0.5% of the Maximum Landing Mass.
options.b: Whenever the cumulative mass changes to the Dry Operating Mass exceeds plus/minus 5% of the Maximum Structural Take-Off Mass.
options.c: At the intervals of nine years if individual aircraft masses are used.
options.d: Whenever there is a modification applied to the aircraft.
